# Subdirectories
add_subdirectory ("aruco")
add_subdirectory ("bioinspired")
add_subdirectory ("calib3d")
add_subdirectory ("ccalib")
add_subdirectory ("core")
add_subdirectory ("dnn")

# Sources

  "aruco-rb.cpp"
  "bgsegm-rb.cpp"
  "bioinspired-rb.cpp"

)
